sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this shmup

special_mechanics.name: Ship Transformation
special_mechanics.description: Player can transform between jet form and mech form with different movement and attack characteristics

physics_values.mech_form_shooting_angle: wider, can fire backwards with upgrades

special_mechanics.name: Arrow Flash Super Ability
special_mechanics.description: Powerful special attack differing by form; jet fires 5 large forward blasts, mech becomes invulnerable with flame aura

physics_values.charge_mode: infinite usage but weaker effect, requires charge time

special_mechanics.name: Shield System
special_mechanics.description: Energy shield pickup allows sustaining 3 hits before destruction

tier_notes: T2 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Arrow Flash is a horizontal shmup without traditional platformer physics (jump, gravity, acceleration). Movement is primarily horizontal/vertical scrolling shooter mechanics. No quantified physics parameters available in documentation.
